title: Part-time Mental Arithmetic Teacher 珠心算老师
description:
We're Hiring: Mental Arithmetic Teacher

Are you passionate about working with children and helping them develop strong math and cognitive skills? Join our team at CMA Mental Arithmetic Toa Payoh, where we nurture young minds through innovative mental arithmetic and abacus training.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Conduct Abacus and Mental Arithmetic classes using our structured video-based teaching tools.
  • Supervise, guide, and motivate students throughout their learning journey.
  • Engage actively with students and parents to share progress and provide support.

Requirements:

  • Genuine passion for teaching and working with children.
  • Strong communication skills and a solid foundation in mathematics.
  • Able to connect well with preschool and primary school students.
  • Energetic, responsible, and committed with a positive work attitude.
  • Available to work:
    Wednesday to Friday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM
  • Sunday: 8:30 PM – 4:00 PM
    Abacus knowledge is a bonus, but not required—comprehensive training will be provided.
  • Prior experience in teaching or working with children is an advantage.

What We Offer:

  • Training and certification in CMA’s unique teaching methodology
  • Supportive and collaborative working environment
  • Opportunities for professional growth
  • Competitive salary (commensurate with experience and qualifications)

If you're enthusiastic about education and want to make a difference in children's lives, we’d love to hear from you!

postedCompany.description:
Welcome to CMA Mental Arithmetic Toa Payoh, a trusted learning center dedicated to nurturing young minds through the power of mental arithmetic. As part of the internationally recognized CMA (Complete Mental Arithmetic) network, we specialize in a unique dual-hand abacus technique that stimulates both the left and right hemispheres of the brain—enhancing concentration, memory, creativity, and confidence in children.

Located in the heart of Toa Payoh, our center provides a supportive and engaging environment where students aged 3 to 12 develop strong mathematical foundations and essential cognitive skills. Our experienced and passionate instructors are committed to helping each child reach their full potential through a structured, fun, and results-driven curriculum.

At CMA Toa Payoh, we believe every child can excel in math and beyond—with the right guidance and tools. Join us on a transformative learning journey where mental arithmetic becomes more than just numbers—it becomes a lifelong advantage.
postedCompany.name: CMA MENTAL ARITHMETIC CENTRE (TOA PAYOH) PTE. LTD.
